_rationale: code_insight is a mode-dispatched tool. Go honours arguments.mode and emits a section-scoped LCF payload (mode=statistics → only STATISTICS section). Fixed iter-5 (task AQQfI8XEEkV6 2026-05-12): the parity-compat tool in src/cli/mcp.cpp now branches on the mode argument and emits per-mode LCF byte-identical to Go on the multi-lang corpus (overview/statistics/structure/unified/git_analyze/git_hotspots). result.content[].text is now stable.

tiers._rationale_stable: Envelope shape (jsonrpc/result/content[].type='text') matches Go MCP spec. result.content[].text now matches byte-for-byte after iter-5 fix — the parity-compat tool emits per-mode LCF payloads identical to Go on multi-lang corpus.
tiers._rationale_ignore: id/jsonrpc/elapsed_ms/server_pid are universal noise per existing MCP descriptor convention.
